hero.subheadline: Transform 18 source types — docs, GitHub repos, PDFs, videos, notebooks, wikis, and more — into AI skills and RAG knowledge. One tool for Claude, Gemini, OpenAI, LangChain, Cursor, and 12+ AI platforms.

about.heading: The Data Layer for AI Systems
about.description: Nexus Core transforms 18 source types — documentation sites, GitHub repos, PDFs, videos, Jupyter notebooks, Word/EPUB documents, OpenAPI specs, Confluence wikis, Notion pages, and more — into structured AI skills and RAG-ready knowledge for 12+ AI platforms.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.item1: Building AI skills takes days of preprocessing — scraping, analyzing code, extracting patterns
problem.item2: AI assistants lack deep expertise without manual context preparation
problem.item3: Understanding new codebases requires weeks of manual analysis
problem.item4: Different AI systems need different formats — skills, RAG, coding rules

solution.title: The Solution
solution.item1: One tool for 18 source types: docs, repos, PDFs, videos, notebooks, wikis, and more
solution.item2: Deep code analysis detects patterns, architecture, and design decisions across 27+ languages
solution.item3: 12+ output platforms: Claude, Gemini, OpenAI, Kimi, DeepSeek, LangChain, Cursor, and more
solution.item4: 15-45 minutes end-to-end: from any source to production-ready AI skill

speed.title: 10x Faster Development
speed.description: Stop copying docs manually. Generate comprehensive skills in minutes, not hours.

expertise.title: Framework Expertise
expertise.description: Give AI assistants deep knowledge of any framework with API references and examples.

uptodate.title: Always Up-to-Date
uptodate.description: Re-run when docs update. Keep your AI knowledge fresh and accurate.

features.title: Complete AI Knowledge Toolkit
features.subtitle: Transform any of 18 source types into structured AI skills and RAG knowledge

formats.title: 12+ AI Platforms
formats.rag: RAG/Vectors: LangChain, LlamaIndex, Chroma, FAISS, Haystack, Qdrant, Weaviate, Pinecone
formats.ai: AI Skills: Claude, Gemini, OpenAI, Kimi, DeepSeek, Qwen, OpenRouter, Together, Fireworks, MiniMax, OpenCode
formats.coding: AI Coding: Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, Continue.dev, Roo, Aider, Bolt, Kilo

items.title: 18 Source Types
items.description: Docs, GitHub, PDF, video, Word, EPUB, Jupyter, OpenAPI, AsciiDoc, PPTX, HTML, RSS, man pages, Confluence, Notion, Slack/Discord, and local codebases

items.title: Agent-Agnostic Architecture
items.description: All enhancers support Claude, Kimi, Codex, Copilot, OpenCode, and custom agents via unified AgentClient

items.title: Three-Stream Analysis
items.description: Split GitHub repos into Code (C3.x), Docs, and Insights streams for comprehensive skills

items.title: Smart SPA Discovery
items.description: Three-layer discovery engine: sitemap.xml, llms.txt, and SPA nav rendering for JavaScript sites

items.title: 40 MCP Tools
items.description: AI agents can prepare their own knowledge with 40 MCP tools across 10 categories

items.title: Marketplace Publisher
items.description: Publish skills to Claude Code plugin marketplace repos with MarketplacePublisher and ConfigPublisher

items.title: Browser Rendering
items.description: Render JavaScript SPA sites with Playwright — auto-installs Chromium, handles React/Vue/Angular

items.title: Doctor Command
items.description: 8 diagnostic checks: Python version, dependencies, API keys, MCP server, output directory

items.title: Prompt Injection Detection
items.description: Bundled security workflow scans scraped content for injection patterns and flags suspicious content

items.title: 12 LLM Platform Targets
items.description: Claude, Gemini, OpenAI, Kimi, DeepSeek, Qwen, OpenRouter, Together, Fireworks, MiniMax, OpenCode, Markdown

items.title: 18 Agent Install Paths
items.description: Install skills to Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, Continue, Roo, Aider, Bolt, Kilo, Kimi, and more

items.title: Video Scraping
items.description: Extract code, transcripts, and structured knowledge from YouTube and local videos with OCR

items.title: AI Enhancement
items.description: Automatically add explanations, examples, and best practices using any AI agent

items.title: 24+ Preset Configs
items.description: Ready-to-use configs for popular frameworks (React, Vue, Django, FastAPI, Godot, etc.)

items.title: 3194+ Tests
items.description: Production-ready with 3194+ tests passing across the entire codebase

items.title: Sync Config
items.description: Crawl doc site navigation, diff URLs against your config, and auto-update with --apply

items.title: UML Architecture Docs
items.description: 21 UML diagrams (class, sequence, activity, component) synced from source code via StarUML

items.title: Zero Manual Work
items.description: Fully automated pipeline from source to production-ready skill

items.title: C3.x Codebase Analysis
items.description: Deep AST analysis across 27+ languages — patterns, examples, guides, configs, and architecture

items.title: PDF & Document OCR
items.description: Extract text from scanned PDFs, Word docs, EPUB e-books, and PowerPoint presentations

items.title: Smart Chunking
items.description: Automatic content splitting optimized for LLM context windows and RAG pipelines

items.title: URL Pattern Filtering
items.description: Include/exclude specific paths with regex pattern matching

items.title: Async Mode
items.description: Parallel scraping with configurable concurrency (up to 50 workers)

items.title: GitHub Auth
items.description: Support for private repositories with GitHub token authentication

quickstart.title: Get Started in 3 Steps
quickstart.subtitle: From zero to production-ready skill in 15-45 minutes

steps.title: 2. Create Skill
steps.code:
nexus-core create https://react.dev
# Or: nexus-core create facebook/react
# Or: nexus-core create ./my-project

steps.title: 3. Package & Deploy
steps.code:
nexus-core package output/react --target claude
# Or: --target langchain, gemini, openai, cursor, ...

usecases.title: Who Uses Nexus Core?
usecases.subtitle: From solo developers to enterprise teams

cases.title: For Developers
cases.description: Create skills from documentation + GitHub repos with automatic conflict detection.
cases.example: Build a React skill from official docs + GitHub repo, catch API changes before they surprise you.

cases.title: For Game Developers
cases.description: Generate comprehensive skills for game engines like Godot (handles 40K+ pages!).
cases.example: Create complete Godot skill covering all topics with intelligent router/hub pattern.

cases.title: For Teams
cases.description: Combine internal docs + code repos + Confluence wikis into single source of truth.
cases.example: Share custom configs via private git repos or publish to the marketplace.

cases.title: For Learners
cases.description: Build comprehensive skills from docs, code examples, videos, and PDF tutorials.
cases.example: Combine official docs + GitHub examples + YouTube tutorials + PDF manual into one learning resource.

cases.title: For Open Source
cases.description: Analyze repos to find documentation gaps and outdated examples automatically.
cases.example: Detect discrepancies between documentation and actual code implementation.

platforms.title: Multi-Platform Support
platforms.subtitle: Export your skills to 12+ LLM platforms with platform-specific optimizations

submit.heading: Share Your Config
submit.subtitle: Created a config for a framework not listed here? Share it with the community!

steps.step1: Validate your config using the tool below
steps.step2: Click "Copy & Submit to GitHub" when valid
steps.step3: Paste your config in the GitHub issue that opens
steps.step4: We'll review and add it to the official gallery!

qualityChecked.title: Quality Checked
